heading: Kingdom Kids Curriculum
subheading: Bible-based learning designed for every classroom and home
overview: The Kingdom Kids curriculum is a 36-week, fully-graded Bible program for children ages 4–12. Each lesson weaves adventure storytelling with Scripture memorization, craft activities, and family discussion guides.

grades.label: Preschool (Ages 3–5)
grades.description: Simple stories, sing-along songs, and hands-on crafts to introduce the biggest ideas of the Bible.

grades.label: Early Elementary (Grades K–2)
grades.description: Engaging lessons with memory verse activities, discussion questions, and take-home pages.

grades.label: Upper Elementary (Grades 3–5)
grades.description: Deeper dives into Bible themes, character studies, and creative writing projects.

grades.label: Middle School (Grades 6–8)
grades.description: Apologetics-ready lessons, worldview discussions, and Scripture journaling.

features.title: 36-Week Scope & Sequence
features.description: A complete school-year curriculum with teacher guides, student pages, and assessment tools.

features.title: Downloadable Resources
features.description: Printable worksheets, craft templates, and parent newsletters included with every unit.

features.title: Multi-Age Adaptations
features.description: Each lesson includes easy adaptations for younger and older learners so mixed-age classes can study together.

features.title: Scripture Memory
features.description: Every lesson highlights a key verse with memory aids, songs, and visual flashcards.

downloads.title: Teacher Curriculum Preview
downloads.description: Download the full Teacher's Guide preview — 12 sample lessons, scope & sequence, and pacing guide.

downloads.title: Student Workbook Preview
downloads.description: See the student experience: activity pages, memory verse cards, and mission challenges.

downloads.title: Scope & Sequence Chart
downloads.description: Full year overview of topics, Bible passages, and learning objectives by grade band.
